name: Robin 800 LEDWash SW
comment:
Robin 800 LEDWash SW™: Spotlessly even light output of the highly popular ROBIN® 800 LEDWash in a SW version, offering smooth output of white only variations.

Please note that library does not contain measured spectral data.

capabilities.comment: Forwards rotation from fast to slow
Backwards rotation from slow to fast
Zone + Rainbow effects slow to fast
Zone + Rainbow effects fast to slow
Random zone effect slow to fast
Random zone + strobe effect slow to fast
Random strobe slow to fast (all zones)
Random strobe slow to fast (random LEDs)
